services.name: Identity And Workspace Service
services.purpose: Manage users, workspaces, roles, invitations, and session authorization.

services.name: Supplier Service
services.purpose: Own supplier profiles, source configuration, vendor grouping, status, and connector metadata.
failure_modes: Supplier-specific behavior leaking into core domains

services.name: Import Service
services.purpose: Own import files, mappings, parsing jobs, validation errors, and normalized import staging.

services.name: Asset Library Service
services.purpose: Own normalized product, service, document, category, tag, collection, and saved-view records.

services.name: Pricing And Margin Service
services.purpose: Own pricing rules, cost components, calculations, margin thresholds, and price snapshots.

services.name: Offer Assembly Service
services.purpose: Own bundles, production recipes, components, quantity scaling, and reusable offering templates.

services.name: Generated Output Service
services.purpose: Own quotes first, with extensible generated-output support for price books, catalogs, and proposals.
failure_modes: Output does not match approved pricing snapshot

services.name: Customer Service
services.purpose: Own customer profiles, contacts, groups, and customer-specific pricing relationships.

services.name: Automation And Notification Service
services.purpose: Own notifications, approval triggers, and future monitoring automation.

services.name: Integration Adapter Service
services.purpose: Own file, supplier, AI, ecommerce, CRM, accounting, and storage adapter contracts.

architecture_decisions.decision: Treat quote generation as the first Generated Output Service use case.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Stage 2 identified quote output as the strongest provisional first output while preserving catalogs and price books as variants.

architecture_decisions.decision: Separate Import Service from Asset Library Service.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Imports are messy, asynchronous, and review-based; normalized assets must remain clean source-of-truth records.

risks_and_constraints.risk: Pricing and generated outputs can become tightly coupled.
risks_and_constraints.mitigation: Generated outputs must reference immutable price snapshots rather than recompute silently.

risks_and_constraints.risk: Integration adapter behavior may leak into supplier and asset domains.
risks_and_constraints.mitigation: Adapters write through import staging or external references, not directly into normalized entities.

tradeoffs.benefit: Simpler MVP implementation, consistent transactions, easier local reasoning.
tradeoffs.cost: Requires discipline to preserve service boundaries.

stage_4_handoff_notes: UX should expose service boundaries as user workflows, not technical modules.
Quote builder should show pricing snapshot and margin state clearly.
stage_5_handoff_notes: Tickets should align to service modules and avoid cross-module writes except through defined APIs.
